name: Speedy Race Car
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a low sleek race car seen from the side, a big number circle on the door, a tall rear spoiler, wide racing tires, a small driver helmet poking above the cockpit, ready to speed off

name: Cute Cartoon Car
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a rounded chubby cartoon car with big friendly headlight eyes and a smiling bumper grille, two round wheels, a small antenna on the roof, looking cheerful and bouncy

name: Classic Convertible
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a vintage convertible car with its top down, long curved fenders, rounded headlights, chrome bumper and trim, whitewall tires, and a pair of bench seats visible inside

name: Off-Road Truck
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a rugged off-road pickup truck with chunky knobby tires, a high body lifted off the ground, a roof rack with two spotlights, mud splashes around the wheels, parked on rocky ground

name: Family Minivan
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a roomy family minivan seen from the side, a sliding door, several large windows, a roof box for luggage on top, four wheels, looking ready for a road trip

name: Police Car
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a friendly police car with a light bar on the roof, a star badge on the door, a number on the side, side mirrors and a front grille, parked and ready to help

name: Sports Car Close-Up
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a close-up front view of a sleek sports car, two sharp angular headlights, a wide low grille, a curved hood with vents, a small license plate, filling most of the frame

name: Easy Toddler Car
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a very simple boxy little car made of big basic shapes, two large round wheels, one square window, one round headlight, and a tiny door, with thick clear shapes and lots of open space

name: Monster Car
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a bold cartoon car with enormous oversized monster-truck wheels lifting it high in the air, a small grinning body on top, big bouncy springs, looking playful and ready to bounce

name: Car at the Gas Station
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a cheerful little car parked beside a gas pump at a service station, a fuel nozzle hose reaching to its tank, a small price sign on a post, a fluffy cloud and the station roof above

name: Electric City Car
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: a small rounded compact electric city car plugged into a charging post by a curb, a charging cable running to its side, a tiny leaf emblem on the door, two doors and a hatchback rear

name: Cars in Traffic
subject: vehicles/car
prompt: three different cars lined up bumper to bumper on a street, a traffic light on a pole beside them, lane lines on the road below, a few simple buildings in the background
